actions: Audited and updated competitor-data.json: verified ServiceMaster (Albany franchise) and ABM (Albany location page) entries; marked Cornerstone Commercial Cleaning and Capital District Maintenance as unconfirmed (no confirmed web presence found via live research).

Added 4 new confirmed Albany-area competitors: Cleantec (cleantec.us, 50 years, top local SEO threat), JAN-PRO Capital District (jan-pro.com/capitaldistrict/), Martinez Cleaning (martinezcleaningllc.com, 20 years), Capital Area Janitorial/Capjan (capjan.com, since 2008).

Created scheduled task 'jarvis-weekly-seo-digest': fires every Monday at 8:00 AM — pulls /api/gsc-data, summarizes ranking movements and quick wins, appends to agent-log.json, commits and pushes to GitHub.
Created scheduled task 'jarvis-daily-seo-audit': fires every day at 9:00 AM — hits /api/seo-audit, logs score and issues to agent-log.json, commits and pushes to GitHub.

JARVIS infrastructure status: myjarvis.app domain live, Chat AI interface deployed, Vercel auto-deploy active on git push, mobile fix deployed, GSC service account (jarvis-gsc-reader@jarvis-tpspro-2026.iam.gserviceaccount.com) pending Search Console property access from Miguel.
blockers: GSC service account not yet granted access to totalpropertysolution.net in Google Search Console — /api/gsc-data and /api/seo-audit will return partial/empty data until Miguel adds jarvis-gsc-reader@jarvis-tpspro-2026.iam.gserviceaccount.com as a verified owner or full user in Search Console.
